NexusPoint Systems / Perth WA
Home About Services Careers Contact Join us

About NexusPoint

A 35-person team running mid-market WA infrastructure.

Founded in 2016 on a simple idea — bring enterprise-grade IT operations to organisations that aren't enterprises.

Profile

What we are.

A managed IT services and cloud solutions provider serving mid-market businesses across Western Australia. Specialises in cloud migration, cybersecurity, and managed infrastructure for organisations with 50-500 employees. Known for proactive monitoring, fast response times, and translating complex technical decisions into business language.
01 / FACT

120+ active managed service contracts

02 / FACT

99.7% uptime SLA across client base

03 / FACT

24/7 NOC with average 12-minute first response

04 / FACT

Microsoft Gold Partner and AWS Select Partner

05 / FACT

65% of revenue from recurring managed services

06 / FACT

Growing cybersecurity practice (up 40% YoY)

Leadership

Who runs the place.

A small leadership group by design. Decisions move fast and the people approving the work also do the work.

01 / EXEC

Alex Nguyen

Managing Director & Co-founder

02 / EXEC

Priya Sharma

Head of Service Delivery

Want to know what we actually deliver?

Our services page covers managed IT, cloud, and security in plain language — no vendor-speak.

Services

NexusPoint Systems

Managed IT services and cybersecurity for Western Australian mid-market businesses. 24/7 NOC, cloud expertise, and security-first by design.
